version.summary: This release adds background update checks and a one-click installer handoff for easier upgrades, while keeping the native Win32 interface compact and lightweight.

downloadTable.description: Portable package with the executable and icon files

home.heroTitle: Simple, fast memory cleanup for Windows.
home.heroBody: MemTrim Lite is a lightweight native desktop application built with Win32 and C++. It shows live RAM and GPU statistics, stays available in the tray, performs safe memory cleanup, and now checks for updates quietly in the background.
mainFeatures: Physical memory, pagefile, and working set statistics
GPU adapter name and memory usage view
Background update check with easy installer upgrade path
Optional administrator mode for stronger cleanup
reasons: Native Win32 application with no web runtime
Fast startup and low memory overhead
installSteps: Run the installer and complete the setup wizard.
Launch the application from Start Menu or desktop shortcut.
Future releases can be installed over the current one from the in-app update prompt or tray menu.
Use the tray icon to reopen it when it is running in the background.

notes: Background update check added at startup
Tray menu now includes manual update checking and installer handoff
Installer can upgrade the existing installation more cleanly
Website theme toggle and app theme toggle added
Website version badge is highlighted for quicker release visibility
Native Win32 desktop app with fixed-size utility interface
Live physical memory, pagefile, and working set statistics
GPU mode with adapter name and memory usage
Safe memory cleanup with stronger elevated cleaning path
Notification-area tray support and background restore behavior
Portable ZIP and Windows installer builds
Website, developers page, privacy page, and support page

privacy.title: Privacy summary
paragraphs: MemTrim Lite is a local Windows utility. It does not require an account and does not upload memory statistics or GPU statistics to a cloud service.
The app now performs a lightweight background update check by requesting a small version manifest. No personal account data is required for that check.
The website is static. If you deploy it on Render or another host, that hosting provider may collect ordinary web logs such as IP address, browser, and request metadata.

support.title: Support
paragraphs: For issues, release discussion, and updates, use the project repository:

MemTrim Lite now checks for updates in the background and can hand off the latest installer directly from inside the app. The installer upgrades the existing installation in place instead of requiring a manual uninstall first.

For public Windows releases, the cleanest installer experience still requires a trusted code-signing certificate. Without code signing and reputation, Windows SmartScreen may still show a warning even when the build is legitimate.
